antipattern.symptom: AGENTS.md file table lists files that no longer exist.
antipattern.root-cause: Refactor PR moved files; AGENTS.md not updated.
antipattern.fix: Add CI check that compares AGENTS.md file table against actual files; fail PR on drift.

antipattern.symptom: AGENTS.md is 200+ lines with prose explanations.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treats AGENTS.md as a tutorial.
antipattern.fix: Move tutorial-style content to `.agents/<topic>.md`; trim AGENTS.md back to routing.

antipattern.symptom: Both README.md and AGENTS.md describe the same dir, with diverging info.
antipattern.root-cause: README authored first; AGENTS.md added later without retiring duplicated sections.
antipattern.fix: Trim README.md to link + human-only context; keep AGENTS.md as source of truth.
